explanations.13: matchPath checks if the current URL matches the pattern /series/:slug, and if it does, it extracts the slug part into an object we can access.
explanations.17: The question mark before params is optional chaining — it safely gets the slug value even if match is null, preventing an error.
explanations.37: This converts the post's series name into a slug (lowercase, no spaces, etc.) so we can compare it against the URL slug to find matching posts.
explanations.43: This sorts the posts so newer ones (later dates) appear first; subtracting b's date from a's date gives us descending order.
